description:
Native REST API client for Windows, macOS and Linux


- Added support for ChatGPT requests
- Added header autocomplete
- Added HMAC hash functions
- Added math functions: round, ceil, ceil, trunc
- Added 2-digit date and time functions
- Added request.uri.xxx variables
- Added request.body variable
- Added random.range function
- Added Swagger support for import (preview) [issues-25]
- Added context menu to workspace dropdown list (top left of the window)
- Fixed error of application crash on startup [issues-39]
- Fixed embedding variables into function parameters [issues-27]
- Fixed errors when importing cURL
- Fixed various other bugs
